title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 322.020 - Dogs prohibited from running at large, when
text:
322.020.  Dogs prohibited from running at large, when. — No dogs affected with rabies, commonly called mad dogs, nor dogs exposed to rabies, shall be allowed to run at large in any city, town, village, township or school district within this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 14538, repealed L. 1953 p. 662 § A, again enacted L. 1955 p. 754) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12864
